claim: Inhibiting HDAC6 decreases survival of mice with ARID1A mutated tumors.

result.claim: Inhibiting HDAC6 decreases survival of mice with ARID1A mutated tumors.
result.reasoning: The claim states that inhibiting HDAC6 decreases the survival of mice with ARID1A mutated tumors. However, evidence from paper ID 5468807, titled "ARID1A-mutated ovarian cancers depend on HDAC6 activity," directly refutes this. Proposition ID prop_1548 from this paper explicitly states: "Inhibition of HDAC6 activity using a clinically applicable small-molecule inhibitor significantly improved the survival of mice bearing ARID1A-mutated tumours." The abstract of the same paper (chunk_17398) further confirms this, indicating that HDAC6 inhibition "significantly improved the survival of mice bearing ARID1A-mutated tumours." This evidence consistently demonstrates that inhibiting HDAC6 *improves* survival, rather than decreasing it, in mice with ARID1A-mutated tumors.

evidence.text: HR+/HER2− metastatic breast cancers showed an increase in mutational signatures S2, S3, S10, S13 and S17.
evidence.source: Genomic characterization of metastatic breast cancers

evidence.text: Some cell lines up-regulated their CD44v6 expression when the same cell lines formed tumors after s.c. injection into severe combined immunodeficient mice.
evidence.source: Regulation of CD44v6-containing Isoforms during Proliferation of Normal and Malignant Epithelial Cells

evidence.text: Absence of IgA in F11r(+/+)Igha(-/-) mice did not affect disease.
evidence.source: Compromised intestinal epithelial barrier induces adaptive immune compensation that protects from colitis.

evidence.text: In KRAS mutant tumors, PIK3CA mutation restores Cyclin D1 expression and G1/S cell cycle progression.
evidence.source: PIK3CA mutation uncouples tumor growth and Cyclin D1 regulation from MEK/ERK and mutant KRAS signaling

evidence.text: Abrogating G-CSF production diminished tumor growth.
evidence.source: Tumor-Derived G-CSF Facilitates Neoplastic Growth through a Granulocytic Myeloid-Derived Suppressor Cell-Dependent Mechanism

evidence.text: Reduced DUSP4 expression in primary tumors after NAC was associated with shorter recurrence-free survival.
evidence.source: Profiling of residual breast cancers after neoadjuvant chemotherapy identifies DUSP4 deficiency as a mechanism of drug resistance

evidence.text: Ezh2(Y641F) is the most common somatic Ezh2 gain-of-function mutation in mice.
evidence.source: An oncogenic Ezh2 mutation induces tumors through global redistribution of histone 3 lysine 27 trimethylation

evidence.text: Loss of either p53 or Lkb1 impaired the response of Kras-mutant cancers to docetaxel monotherapy in mice.
evidence.source: A murine lung cancer co-clinical trial identifies genetic modifiers of therapeutic response

evidence.text: The study used an inducible mouse model of NRAS-mutant melanoma.
evidence.source: Oncogenic NRAS signaling differentially regulates survival and proliferation in melanoma

evidence.text: Expression of Ezh2(Y641F) in mouse B cells caused lymphoma.
evidence.source: An oncogenic Ezh2 mutation induces tumors through global redistribution of histone 3 lysine 27 trimethylation

evidence.text: A two-step mouse model was used for myeloid leukemic disease progression involving overexpression of human mutant NRAS and BCL2 genes.
evidence.source: Reactive oxygen species, DNA damage, and error-prone repair: a model for genomic instability with progression in myeloid leukemia?

evidence.text: S3 inhibited 6PGD, cancer cell proliferation and tumor growth.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: Inhibition of HDAC6 activity using a clinically applicable small-molecule inhibitor significantly improved the survival of mice bearing ARID1A-mutated tumours.
evidence.source: ARID1A-mutated ovarian cancers depend on HDAC6 activity

evidence.text: Physcion inhibited 6PGD, cancer cell proliferation and tumor growth.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 inhibited the proliferation of HER2-amplified BT474 cells exogenously expressing mutations.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: The ALK kinase inhibitor TAE684 produced greater tumor regression and improved overall survival compared with carboplatin and paclitaxel in the genetically engineered mouse model.
evidence.source: Inhibition of ALK, PI3K/MEK, and HSP90 in Murine Lung Adenocarcinoma Induced by EML4-ALK Fusion Oncogene

evidence.text: Ectopically over-expressing G-CSF in G-CSF-negative tumors significantly augmented tumor growth.
evidence.source: Tumor-Derived G-CSF Facilitates Neoplastic Growth through a Granulocytic Myeloid-Derived Suppressor Cell-Dependent Mechanism

evidence.text: Tspan3 deletion improved survival in mouse models of AML.
evidence.source: Tetraspanin 3 Is Required for the Development and Propagation of Acute Myelogenous Leukemia.

evidence.text: Physcion and S3 inhibited tumor growth in nude mice xenografts.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: The combination of NVP-BEZ235 and ARRY-142886 resulted in marked synergy in shrinking Kras-mutant cancers.
evidence.source: Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers
